falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (200-day moving average) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key resistance level would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: Crude oil futures trade above $85/barrel with volume exceeding 2 million contracts/day for 5 straight days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate strong demand and market sentiment contradicting the blowoff pattern's expectation of price exhaustion

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis point rate cut at its next policy meeting
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: An unexpected aggressive rate cut would directly contradict the macroeconomic conditions assumed in the original pattern analysis

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
